text:
Once upon a time in a village shrouded in mist, there lived a wise owl named Oliver. Every dusk, he'd gaze out over his forest home, dreaming of distant lands.

One day, while he was soaring through the clouds, a flash of silver appeared. It couldn't be an ordinary meteorite—it glowed! Oliver swooped down and picked it up. It felt heavy yet oddly warm. That night he dreamed he found a magic stone that could reveal secrets forgotten.

Returning home, Oliver whispered the stone into a small crack in his wall. Flames danced, revealing hidden paths through old woods. One led him far from home to a mysterious lake. At its center, an old willow tree floated tranquilly.

Oliver sat by the tree's side. The willow whispered ancient tales of himeness—a place where all stories merge.

Feeling special, Oliver peered beyond the lake. In a secret glade lay a town where the shadows held secrets. There he learned
